results.name: Anthropic
results.urgent_flag: PRE-VOTE: April 24 Illinois SB 3261 committee vote — Anthropic is primary industry supporter of frontier-AI disclosure mandate. The large delta is PRIMARILY a published-composite methodology artifact (stored raw scores mean 3.5375 -> 63.4 canonical; published 90.9 includes integration premium ~+27 exceeding v1.1 H1 +10 cap). Event-driven delta alone is ~-2.
results.key_finding: Ballard Partners hire and $1.6M Q1 lobbying create INT tension; SB 3261 support offsetting but does not cross back to exemplary under canonical scoring

results.name: OpenAI
results.urgent_flag: PRE-VOTE: April 24 Illinois SB 3444 committee vote — OpenAI is industry sponsor of AI liability shield for mass casualties. Even bill sponsor Cunningham says sweeping relief 'highly unlikely.' Trial jury selection April 27.
results.key_finding: SB 3444 advocacy directly contradicts OpenAI's own catastrophic-risk taxonomy — I4 anchor 1 values-alignment failure

results.name: IBM
results.key_finding: First-ever DOJ FCA settlement under Civil Rights Fraud Initiative ($17M, April 10) sets hard EQU/ACC anchor; partial positive on ACC/AB1-AB2 for cooperation credit

results.name: Meta AI
results.urgent_flag: Keylogger rollout April 21-22 is compound to prior 2026 verdict cluster
results.key_finding: Model Capability Initiative keylogger is textbook I3 anchor 1: internal culture significantly less compassionate than external comms

results.name: Palantir AI
results.key_finding: EFF documented non-response to accountability questions = AB1 anchor 1; human-rights policy practiced only where reputationally beneficial = I2 anchor 1

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Musk no-show for April 20 Paris prosecutor summons confirms AB1/I1/I4 anchor 1 pattern; floor held at 2.2

results.name: Scale AI
results.key_finding: DOL investigation dropped May 2025 but civil lawsuits remain; wage-theft/misclassification anchors EMP/BND

results.name: Waymo
results.key_finding: Dual NHTSA/NTSB school-bus investigations + child strike anchor ACC/AB3; voluntary recall is AB2 positive but AC3 regression when post-recall violations continue

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Q1 beat demonstrates I5 resilience but DOJ Medicare Advantage probe remains open with no timeline

results.name: United States
results.urgent_flag: DEI EO federal-contractor clause effective April 25
results.key_finding: DEI EO structural EQU regression with IBM settlement operationalizing FCA enforcement; I4 anchor 1 policy-reversal-without-acknowledgment

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Year 4 of war; 14M displaced; famine confirmed in Al Fasher/Kadugli; zero floor maintained

results.name: South Sudan
results.defer_rationale: Scanner guidance: 'Assess AFTER vote outcome.' UNMISS mandate expires April 30; Security Council vote imminent. Re-queue for next assessor run after vote.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: INGO deregistration closes ~1/3 of Gaza health facilities; UN experts explicitly name EU trade suspension as 'minimum requirement' — rare naming

results.name: Amazon
results.urgent_flag: Band boundary crossing despite small numerical delta
results.key_finding: Troutdale worker death + 1-hour work-around-body order = EMP/E1 anchor 1; first NLRB bargaining order against Amazon = BND/ACC floor

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: April 18 ceasefire mechanism partial BND/SYS positive; M23 immunity demand blocks ACC; UN reports continuing deterioration

results.name: Deere & Company
results.methodology_flag: F500 Gen-2 uniform-score artifact at rank 87
results.key_finding: Layoff pattern + Mexico expansion I-axis tension offset by pay-freeze-includes-executives I3 positive and $20B US-manufacturing commitment

results.name: Macy's
results.methodology_flag: F500 Gen-2 uniform 3.0x8 artifact at rank 88
results.key_finding: 1,050 CT warehouse layoffs ending April 30; 150-store closure trajectory; no union representation

results.name: Interpublic Group
results.methodology_flag: F500 Gen-2 uniform 3.0x8 artifact at rank 89; ALSO: IPG no longer standalone entity post Omnicom close Nov 2025
results.key_finding: IPG effectively ceased standalone existence Nov 26, 2025; $1.5B synergy target doubled post-close; 4,000+ reductions anticipated

results.name: Norway
results.methodology_flag: Perfect 100 is empirically unreachable under behavioral-anchor scoring — upper-bound ceiling artifact
results.key_finding: Evidence supports exemplary band decisively; oil-welfare paradox prevents anchor-5 I4; Sámi-rights partial limits EQ5

results.name: New Zealand
results.key_finding: Te Tiriti constitutional framework exceptional; Māori life-expectancy gap persists as EQ2/EQ3 anchor; current coalition Treaty-scaleback is I1 pressure

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: Fortune-500 entries at ranks 41 (IBM 3.5x8), 87 (Deere 3.5/3.5/3.5/2.5/3.5/3/3.5/3), 88 (Macy's 3.0x8), 89 (IPG 3.0x8) all exhibit flat or near-flat per-dimension scoring that cannot be derived from granular subdimension evidence. Fourth consecutive night this pattern has been flagged. Surface as sector trend.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Formal methodology review of F500 Gen-2 scoring batch — likely needs re-scoring from evidence base

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: Anthropic published composite 90.9 appears to incorporate integration premium ~+27, substantially exceeding methodology v1.1 H1 +10 cap. Canonical unweighted mean of stored raw scores yields 63.4, consistent with research assessment of 61.6.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Methodology review on integration-premium application across ai-labs index; check whether other entities exhibit similar overrun

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: Norway stored at composite 100 with raw 5/5/5/4.5/5/5/5/5. Mean of these = 4.9375 scaled = 98.4 canonical, not 100. Separately, perfect anchor-5 across all 40 subdimensions is empirically unreachable — even Norway has documented Sámi-rights, oil-climate, and immigrant-integration anchor-3-to-4 evidence.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Set empirical ceiling around 95 across indexes; any stored 100 warrants review

methodology_artifacts_surfaced.description: IPG acquired by Omnicom Nov 26, 2025 — no longer standalone entity. F500 index still carries IPG as standalone at rank 89.
methodology_artifacts_surfaced.recommendation: Consider removing IPG from F500 index or merging with Omnicom entry if Omnicom exists in index

urgent_digest_items: 48-hour window: Illinois SB 3261 (Anthropic-supported) and SB 3444 (OpenAI-supported) committee vote April 24 — both assessments produced today capture pre-vote evidence state
April 25: Trump DEI EO federal-contractor clause effective; IBM settlement is first operationalization
Before April 30: South Sudan UNMISS Security Council vote — assessment DEFERRED; re-queue
April 27: Musk v. OpenAI trial jury selection begins — reassess OpenAI if new disclosures emerge
May 19: Anthropic v. DoD oral arguments — pending for next cycle

not_assessed.name: South Sudan
not_assessed.reason: Scanner guidance: assess AFTER UNMISS mandate renewal vote (before April 30). Premature assessment would score speculation, not evidence. Re-queue for next run.

assessor_notes.anthropic_calibration: Held rigorous evidence-driven scoring despite boundary-adjacent published composite. Event-driven delta is -2 (INT 3.4 → 3.0 on Ballard hire); the -29.3 composite delta is primarily a published-calc artifact. Recommended digest framing: separate the two in the public narrative.
assessor_notes.f500_gen2_pattern_confirmation: Fourth consecutive night. IBM, Deere, Macy's, Interpublic all confirm the uniform-score-artifact pattern via evidence-based assessment. Composites drop 8-13 points when moved to granular scoring. Methodology review should prioritize the F500 Gen-2 batch.
assessor_notes.new_baselines: Six first-ever baselines today: IBM, Palantir AI, Scale AI, Waymo, Norway, New Zealand. Palantir AI at 12.8 and Norway at 84.7 are the most notable — Palantir confirms sub-20 scan expectation; Norway's -15.3 delta mostly attributable to perfect-100 artifact.
assessor_notes.critical_band_trajectory: Amazon band crossing developing → critical is small numerical delta (-3.8) but materially changes the narrative for F500 rank 388. Change proposal flags for reviewer attention.
